THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CONLAN, LYNDA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WORLD SCHOOL OF MASSAGE AND HOLISTIC HEALING ARTS,  LLC $1,914.75 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,979.75, THE CONTRACT ENTITLED PLAINTIFF TO A PRO-RATA REFUND BASED ON THE HOURS OF THE PROGRAM SHE COMPLETED, NOT BASED ON THE HOURS THAT WERE AVAILABLE FOR HER TO COMPLETE. MOREOVER, DEFENDANT IS FTB-SUSPENDED AND IS NOT ENTITLED TO DEFEND IN CIVIL ACTIONS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
